overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a player character walking through a shallow river and along the wilderness shoreline, encountering bighorn sheep and bison while approaching a railway bridge. The scene features realistic natural lighting, detailed rock formations, and dynamic wildlife behavior in a pristine river valley environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: river shallows with rocky cliffs opposite

events.description: player enters the shallow river water from the gravel shore
bighorn sheep become visible drinking in the river ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the river and entering the shallow water, approaching the wildlife

notable_agents.action: group of bighorn sheep standing in the river drinking water

entered.detail: tall layered rock cliffs rising above the opposite riverbank with vertical striations
dense pine and spruce trees covering the hillside above the cliffs
clear shallow river with visible rocky bottom and gentle current
pebble and sand riverbank at the water's edge
thin column of smoke rising from behind the distant cliffs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit river valley with towering rocky cliffs across the water. The player walks from the gravel shore into the shallow river where a group of bighorn sheep are drinking. The clear water reveals the rocky riverbed beneath as the camera approaches the wildlife.

events.description: player wades through deeper section of the river ford
bighorn sheep startle and run away as player approaches too closely

agents.ego_description: wading through the river toward the opposite bank, causing the wildlife to scatter and flee

notable_agents.action: bighorn sheep running through the shallow water away from the player
bighorn sheep fleeing upstream through the river

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder sitting in the middle of the river

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the river shallows, passing a large mossy boulder as the bighorn sheep panic and run away through the water. The camera continues toward the opposite bank while the cliff formation shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank curve following the water's edge

events.description: player exits the water onto the sandy and pebble beach
camera turns slightly to follow the curving shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy and gravel beach following the river's gentle curve, staying near the water's edge

entered.detail: wide sandy and gravel beach along the inside of the riverbend
cluster of large weathered rocks along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the player walks along the sandy beach that curves with the riverbend. Large boulders dot the shoreline while the water remains visible to the right. The cliff formation that was on the right is now behind on the left as the camera follows the geography.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside approach to railway bridge with wildlife

events.description: large railway bridge becomes visible spanning the river in the distance

agents.ego_description: moving through shallow water and dense vegetation toward the railway bridge where bison are grazing

notable_agents.action: group of bison grazing near the railway bridge pillars in the water

entered.detail: large metal railway trestle bridge with wooden supports spanning the river valley
thick green shrubs and vegetation growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a massive railway bridge that spans the river ahead. The player moves through shallow water and dense riverside bushes toward the structure, where a herd of bison can be seen grazing near the bridge pillars. The sun creates a bright glare as the camera faces toward the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit river valley that transitions from a wildlife encounter in the shallows to the approach of a massive industrial bridge. It begins on a gravel shore, moving into the clear, shallow water where a group of bighorn sheep drink against a backdrop of towering rocky cliffs. As the camera passes a large mossy boulder, the sheep panic and scatter through the current, and the perspective shifts as the cliffs move to the right side of the frame. The scene then expands onto a curving sandy beach dotted with boulders, with the cliff formations receding behind to the left as the camera follows the riverbend. Finally, the movement leads through dense riverside bushes and shallow water toward a railway bridge, where a herd of bison grazes near the pillars under a bright solar glare.
